title: Kraken Mod
description:
A mod that add a Kraken and a structure in the ocean.

The geckolib library is needed.
body:
# The Kraken

This mod adds a new mob to Minecraft: the **Kraken**, a formidable sea creature that drops a special key upon defeat.  

![The Kraken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97efce4c1faa171487fdd043a17b99e0eef32d83.jpeg)  

## The Underwater Vault  
The key dropped by the Kraken can be used to open an **Underwater Vault**, hidden in the depths of the oceans.  

![The underwater vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/061964b24027e3a8788cb989ff672e7de3706ad4.jpeg)  

## Learn More  

I created this mod for the following video:
